_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: We identified 308 genes differentially expressed between mouse nerves from the CNP-HRas12V and normal control mouse nerves (FDR ≤ 0.01)
details: Identified 308 genes differentially expressed between CNP-HRas12V and normal control mouse nerves (FDR ≤ 0.01).
